modelNotes.en: Static preview story archive content. audiences marks which audience landing views (alumni, active, recruiting) surface each story; an item with no audiences tag is treated as recruiting-visible by default.
modelNotes.es: Contenido estatico del archivo de historias de la vista previa. audiences indica en que vistas de audiencia (alumni, active, recruiting) aparece cada historia; un elemento sin la etiqueta audiences se trata como visible solo para recruiting por defecto.

title.en: From Panama City to Pleasant Valley
title.es: De Ciudad de Panama a Pleasant Valley

excerpt.en: Maria co-taught ESL in Wichita and helped build a sister-school partnership that still connects classrooms.
excerpt.es: Maria coenseno ESL en Wichita y ayudo a crear una alianza escolar que aun conecta aulas.

title.en: Twelve years, nine teachers, one guest room
title.es: Doce anos, nueve docentes, una habitacion

excerpt.en: The Kadel family story models how hosting turns exchange logistics into lifelong relationships.
excerpt.es: La historia de la familia Kadel muestra como hospedar crea relaciones duraderas.

title.es: Un diario del clima entre hemisferios

excerpt.en: A daily classroom habit became a bilingual lesson plan on seasons, measurement, and geography.
excerpt.es: Un habito diario se convirtio en un plan bilingue sobre estaciones, medicion y geografia.

title.es: La idea en la mesa familiar

excerpt.en: The founding idea connected one educator with thousands of students over a career.
excerpt.es: La idea fundadora conecto a un educador con miles de estudiantes durante una carrera.
